app.name: OptiVorbis
app.one_liner: A library and application for lossless, format-preserving, two-pass optimization and repair of Vorbis data, reducing its size without altering any audio information.

screens.name: OptiVorbis CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Provide command-line access to lossless Vorbis optimization and repair functionality.

rust_commands.name: optimize_vorbis
rust_commands.purpose: Perform two-pass lossless optimization on an Ogg Vorbis file to reduce size while preserving audio fidelity.

rust_commands.name: repair_vorbis
rust_commands.purpose: Attempt to repair a malformed but recoverable Vorbis stream using lenient parsing and spec-compliant reconstruction.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add CLI interface with basic commands
week 1: Implement core two-pass Vorbis optimizer
week 1: Integrate lenient parser for repair capability
acceptance_tests: Given a malformed but recoverable Vorbis stream, when processed by OptiVorbis, then the tool either repairs it successfully or provides actionable error diagnostics.
Given a valid Ogg Vorbis file, when optimized with OptiVorbis, then the output file decodes to identical audio samples and is smaller in size.
